title: Register for the National Community Cultural Training Programme
description: Register for a 2025 community-based cultural training course.
summary: The National Community Cultural Training Programme offers free training in community-based cultural activities, including drumming, dance, drama and visual arts.
Classes run after school and at weekends across the parishes.
who_can_apply: parents or guardians registering a child under 16

items: the participant’s full name, address and date of birth
the cultural area they want to train in
for under-16s, the parent or guardian’s details

how_long: Places are usually confirmed within 2 weeks of the closing date.

options.heading: Online
content: Complete the National Community Cultural Training Programme 2025: Registration Form on the Ministry website.

contact.agency: Ministry of Youth, Sports and Community Empowerment
contact.address:
Sky Mall, Haggatt Hall
St. Michael
